security.description: Security practices: RLS on all tables, rate limiting on all routes, no secrets in code, CSP headers, input validation

code_quality.description: TypeScript coverage, error handling, pattern consistency, no dead code, no antipatterns

performance.description: Build size, runtime performance, lazy loading, caching headers, no N+1 queries

accessibility.description: WCAG AA compliance (4.5:1 contrast), semantic HTML, keyboard navigation, focus states

ux.description: Loading states, error states, empty states, error boundaries, no lorem ipsum, transitions

architecture.description: Separation of concerns, correct file structure, no circular imports, env vars via import.meta.env

test_coverage.description: Unit tests, integration tests, E2E tests, coverage configuration

seo.description: Title tag, meta description, OpenGraph tags, canonical URL, semantic HTML

documentation.description: README, CLAUDE.md, API docs, inline comments, .env.example

i18n.description: No hardcoded locale formats, i18n library or pattern, no English-only assumptions
